tasks.title: Build "deny test" workflow
tasks.spec:
Outcome: A simple workflow with a Manual Trigger and a single Set node named "deny test".

Trigger mode: Manual trigger (n8n-nodes-base.manualTrigger). No external event source.

External systems: None.

Required effects: The Set node named "deny test" should set at least one field (e.g. a field called "result" with a static value like "denied") to demonstrate it is wired and functional.

Required branches: None — single linear path from trigger to Set node.

Required data: No upstream data required. The Set node defines its own static output.

Explicit constraints:
- The Set node must be named exactly "deny test".
- No other nodes beyond the Manual Trigger and the "deny test" Set node.

Empty/invalid behavior: Not applicable — no dynamic input.

Done when: Workflow is saved with a Manual Trigger connected to a Set node named "deny test", workflow runs successfully via manual trigger, and the Set node output is visible in the execution result.

planningContext.summary: Build a single workflow with a Manual Trigger and a Set node named "deny test", then run it to confirm it executes successfully.
assumptions: The Set node will output a static field (e.g. result = "denied") as a minimal demonstration.

suspendPayload.message: Review the plan (1 task) before execution starts.
